creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just a heads up that the following items lack $FreeBSD$ RCS keywords, which will cause someone some grief if/when they're modified/will be committed:

usr.bin/fortune/tools/...
    .../Do_spell
    .../Do_troff
    .../Troff.mac
    .../Troff.sed

It may or may not make sense to remove the scripts if they're unused (they seem to be present for vestigial reasons, minus maybe "Do_spell").
